meta.title: Vasu Garg — Senior Frontend Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Vasu Garg, a Senior Frontend Engineer with 4+ years of experience building real-time, AI-integrated web applications.

profile.name: Vasu Garg
profile.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
profile.tagline: I build fast, reliable & production-grade web experiences.
profile.bio: Senior Frontend Engineer with 4+ years of experience owning the full frontend lifecycle — from architecture and UI/UX design to production delivery. I care about real-time systems, clean code, and interfaces that make complex data feel simple.
profile.bio2: When I'm not shipping, I'm exploring anime ⛩️ or games 🎮, building side projects, or going down internet rabbit holes.

highlights: Owned AI Trading Assistant frontend end-to-end — UI/UX design, state architecture, WebSocket + HTTP services, multi-chat management, LLM response parsing, and YAML editor for AI-generated strategy configuration.

Built standalone Plans & Pricing platform (React + Node/MongoDB) — configurable subscription plans with monthly/quarterly/yearly billing, credit top-ups, and pack-based purchases; Chargebee integration for payment processing.
Integrated Mixpanel — designed event tracking schema and captured full user journeys; platform grew by ~800–1,000 new signups in a single quarter.
Mentored 4 junior engineers on Git workflows, PR standards, and CI/CD practices.

Built Cove Drive — zero-knowledge cloud storage (AES + RSA encryption), password-protected sharing, chunk-based file handling, and in-app preview for 15+ formats; clean OOP and SOLID architecture directly led to promotion to Senior Engineer.
Refactored Angular templates into reusable components, reducing bundle size by 35% (400 KB → 260 KB) and measurably improving load performance.

Delivered eKYC multi-vendor platform — runtime JSON-configurable KYC flows across 6+ B2B white-label clients; Digio + DigiLocker integration for Aadhaar/PAN, eSign, live selfie, and QR mobile handoff — cutting manual workload by 40%.
Implemented Google Analytics across products — ~500 MAU growth in one quarter; resolved production bugs via JIRA, reducing open bug count 15% QoQ.

projects.name: AI Trading Assistant
projects.description: An AI-powered trading assistant built end-to-end — from architecture to delivery. Supports natural language strategy creation, real-time market data via WebSockets, multi-session chat management, and a YAML editor for AI-generated algo configurations.
highlights: Full frontend ownership — UI/UX design, state models, WebSocket + HTTP service layers
LLM response parsing with context-aware stock analysis tabs
Platform grew ~800–1,000 new signups in a single quarter post-launch

projects.name: eKYC Platform
projects.description: A runtime-configurable multi-vendor KYC platform where entire form flows are driven by JSON config — enabling sections to be added, removed, or updated across 6+ B2B white-label clients without redeployment. Feature flags managed via Firebase Remote Config.
highlights: Digio + DigiLocker SDK integration for Aadhaar/PAN upload, eSign, live selfie capture, and silent QR-based mobile handoff
Cut manual document processing workload by 40%
White-labelled admin dashboard for agents to manage KYC approvals and offline customer data

projects.name: Cove Drive — Encrypted Cloud Storage
projects.description: A zero-knowledge cloud storage product with AES + RSA client-side encryption — users retain sole control of their keys. Built with anonymous and password-protected sharing, chunk-based upload/download for large files, and in-app preview for 15+ file formats.
highlights: Zero-knowledge architecture — files encrypted before leaving the client, server never sees plaintext
Complex password-protected anonymous sharing on a zero-knowledge system
Clean OOP and SOLID architecture recognised internally — directly led to promotion to Senior Engineer

projects.name: Plans & Pricing Platform
projects.description: A standalone full-stack subscription platform decoupled from the main app, sharing only authentication. Supports configurable plans with multiple billing frequencies, credit top-ups, and pack-based purchases — all driven by dynamic backend configuration.
highlights: Configurable monthly, quarterly, and yearly billing with credit top-ups and packs
Chargebee integration for payment processing with fully dynamic plan configuration
MERN stack — designed data models and full frontend architecture end-to-end

projects.name: Sekai
projects.description: An anime catalogue and tracker built as a solo project — browse, search, and manage a personal watchlist with full tracking. Uses the AniList GraphQL API for live anime data, with Firestore persistence and Firebase OAuth.
highlights: Full watchlist and tracking management persisted via Firestore
Redux + TanStack Query for state management and server-state caching
Converted to a PWA — installable on desktop and mobile

projects.name: React Lab
projects.description: A MERN-stack monorepo of 13+ mini apps under a single codebase — shared routing, unified deployment, ranging from simple utilities to full-stack features. CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions deploys automatically to Firebase Hosting.
highlights: Formlyst — full-stack dynamic form builder with runtime JSON rendering, shareable public URLs, and response persistence in MongoDB
Super Tic-Tac-Toe — 3×3 meta-board variant with complete rule enforcement
CI/CD via GitHub Actions → Firebase Hosting; single deployment for all 13+ apps

education.institution: Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology
